name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-24
title: Remove new-feature.py + validate-all.py after rabbit-feature-new + rabbit-feature-audit skills land
description:
Cleanup after the feature-lifecycle ownership move.

Once rabbit-feature-new and rabbit-feature-audit skills are in place (separate backlogs), delete:
- .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/new-feature.py
- .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/validate-all.py

Update rabbit-cage spec.md and contract.md to remove invariants/provides entries for the deleted scripts. Update tests. Bump version.

DEPENDS ON: both rabbit-feature-new and rabbit-feature-audit backlogs landing first.
